titleStmt.title: SII 17.614: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 614. (A.R. No. 569 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the Achalēśvara shrine in the south-east corner of the second prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
This inscription begins with the praśasti Tirumagaḷ pōla of Rājarājakēsari Rājarāja I.

This seems to record the exemption from some taxes and poliyūṭṭu-kaḍamai due to god Śrīyārūr dēvar on some pieces of land in lieu of 40 kāśu received from the servants of the god Vishṇu••••••• who was pleased to be in the standing posture at maṉṟakam by the peruṅguṟi sabhā of Vēlaṅguḍi, a brahmadēyam of Tiruvārūr-kkūṟṟam in Kshatriyaśīkhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ polap perunilaccelviyun taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉak koḷak kāntaḷurccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampāṭiyun taṭikai pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻa maṇṭalamum Iraṭṭa pāṭi Eḻarai Ila
ṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkorājarājakesaripanmarāḷa śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 23āvatu kṣatriyacikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvārurkkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam velaṅkuṭip peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyom Innāṭṭu Ikkūṟṟattu tiruvārur maṉṟa kattu niṉṟaruḷiṉa viṣṇubha
nilattil Ittevaruṭaiya nilaṉ Oṉṟe Oru māvarai Innilan Oṉṟe Oru māvaraikkum Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai tirunāraṇa vāykkālukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Uṭciṟu vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Uṟuppuṭṭūr viṣṇukramavittaṉ makaṉ Uḻutaya krama vittaṉ nilattukku kiḻakku
Uḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilaṉ Oṉṟe Oru māvaraiyum virivu maṭakkeṉṉāte mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka pottakattukkuḷ Uḷḷatellāmu māṉatum Itdevarite Ivvūr pattukkaṇṭattu Ivaruṭaiya nāṟṟukkāl kāṇi Araikkāṇikkum Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai Uṟuppuṭṭur ceṭṭakuṉ
ppaṭanikramavittaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Uṭciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai mu ṟaippoṉa nampikramavittaṉ maṉaikkum puḻuccalūr nakkacanmaṉ maṉaikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellai Uḷḷum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilaṉ kāṇi Araikkā
kkuḻi vantavāṟum Āka Ivvellaikaḷukku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilamum Iṉnāṟṟukkālum pottakattukkuḻi van=tavāṟu Uḷḷa nilattāl van=ta Iṟai Ivvūru makappaṭuttivan=ta Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum veṭṭiyum veḷḷāṉ kuṭimaiyum śrīyārur tevarkku kaṭava poliyūṭṭukkaṭamaiyum Uṭppaṭa maṟṟum Ūriṭu varippāṭu Āca
kāttuk kuṭukka kaṭavomāka Itdevarkke yāṇṭu 10 6 Āvatu Immaṉṟakattu niṉ ṟaruḷiṉa devariṭaik koṇṭa kācu 7 Ivivar Irupattu muṉṟāvatu Itdevar Āparaṇaṅkaḷum Abhiṣekamum poṭu ḻittu Itdevarkanmikaḷ tara sa bhaiyom koṇṭa kācu muppattiraṇṭum Ākak kācu 4 10
Digital edition of SII 17.614 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
